code:
// 교육용 빅뱅 시뮬레이션 - 2D Canvas 기반
// 이미지 형식처럼 4단계를 모두 표시
export function createEducationalBigBangCanvas(){const canvas=document.createElement('canvas');canvas.width=1200;canvas.height=800;const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');// 배경
ctx.fillStyle='#000000';ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);// 단계별 위치
const stages=[{x:200,y:200,name:'쿼크-글루온\n플라즈마',time:'10⁻¹² 초'},{x:600,y:200,name:'양성자/중성자\n형성',time:'10⁻⁶ 초'},{x:200,y:550,name:'핵융합\n원자핵 형성',time:'1-3 분'},{x:600,y:550,name:'원자 형성\n(보어 모델)',time:'38만 년'}];// 각 단계 그리기
drawStage0(ctx,stages[0].x,stages[0].y);// 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마
drawStage1(ctx,stages[1].x,stages[1].y);// 양성자/중성자
drawStage2(ctx,stages[2].x,stages[2].y);// 핵융합
drawStage3(ctx,stages[3].x,stages[3].y);// 원자
// 텍스트 레이블
stages.forEach((stage,idx)=>{// 단계 이름
ctx.fillStyle='#ffffff';ctx.font='bold 14px Arial';ctx.textAlign='center';const lines=stage.name.split('\n');lines.forEach((line,i)=>{ctx.fillText(line,stage.x,stage.y+95+i*16);});// 시간
ctx.fillStyle='#cccccc';ctx.font='12px Arial';ctx.fillText(stage.time,stage.x,stage.y+130);});return canvas;}// 1️⃣ 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마
function drawStage0(ctx,x,y){const centerX=x;const centerY=y;// 중앙 뭉치 - 컬러풀한 입자들
drawColorfulCore(ctx,centerX,centerY,15,200);// 3개 궤도
drawOrbit(ctx,centerX,centerY,40,'#ff4444',true);// 빨강
drawOrbit(ctx,centerX,centerY,65,'#4488ff',true);// 파랑
drawOrbit(ctx,centerX,centerY,90,'#44ff44',true);// 초록
}// 2️⃣ 양성자/중성자 형성
function drawStage1(ctx,x,y){const centerX=x;const centerY=y;// 더 큰 중앙 핵
drawColorfulCore(ctx,centerX,centerY,22,300);// 2개 궤도 (더 가까움)
drawOrbit(ctx,centerX,centerY,45,'#ffaa88',false);// 연빨강
drawOrbit(ctx,centerX,centerY,70,'#88bbff',false);// 연파랑
}// 3️⃣ 핵융합 → 원자핵 형성
function drawStage2(ctx,x,y){const centerX=x;const centerY=y;// 더 큰 핵 (여러 색상)
drawNucleus(ctx,centerX,centerY,30,400);// 1개 궤도 (거의 중심)
drawOrbit(ctx,centerX,centerY,45,'#ffcc77',false);}// 4️⃣ 원자 형성 (보어 모델)
function drawStage3(ctx,x,y){const centerX=x;const centerY=y;// 매우 작은 핵 (중앙)
ctx.fillStyle='#ffff44';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(centerX,centerY,4,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();// 3개 전자 껍질 원형
ctx.strokeStyle='#44bbff';ctx.lineWidth=1;// K-shell
ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(centerX,centerY,30,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();// L-shell
ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(centerX,centerY,55,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();// M-shell
ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(centerX,centerY,80,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();// 전자 입자들
drawElectrons(ctx,centerX,centerY,30,8,'#44bbff');drawElectrons(ctx,centerX,centerY,55,12,'#66ccff');drawElectrons(ctx,centerX,centerY,80,10,'#88ddff');}// 중앙 뭉치 - 컬러풀한 입자들
function drawColorfulCore(ctx,x,y,radius,numParticles){const colors=['#ff5555','#5588ff','#55ff55','#ffff55'];for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){const angle=i/numParticles*Math.PI*2+Math.random()*0.3;const r=Math.random()*radius;const px=x+Math.cos(angle)*r;const py=y+Math.sin(angle)*r;const color=colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)];ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.globalAlpha=0.7;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,1.5,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();}ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;}// 원자핵 (다양한 색상)
function drawNucleus(ctx,x,y,radius,numParticles){const nucleusColors=['#22ffff','#55ff55','#ffff55'];for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){const angle=i/numParticles*Math.PI*2+Math.random()*0.2;const r=Math.random()*radius;const px=x+Math.cos(angle)*r;const py=y+Math.sin(angle)*r;const color=nucleusColors[i%3];ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.globalAlpha=0.8;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,1.2,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();}ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;}// 궤도 그리기
function drawOrbit(ctx,x,y,radius,color){let dashed=arguments.length>5&&arguments[5]!==undefined?arguments[5]:false;ctx.strokeStyle=color;ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.globalAlpha=0.6;if(dashed){ctx.setLineDash([5,5]);}ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,radius,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;// 궤도 입자들
const numParticles=Math.floor(radius*2.5);for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){const angle=i/numParticles*Math.PI*2;const px=x+Math.cos(angle)*radius;const py=y+Math.sin(angle)*radius;ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.globalAlpha=0.8;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,0.8,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();}ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;}// 전자 그리기
function drawElectrons(ctx,x,y,radius,count,color){for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const angle=i/count*Math.PI*2;const px=x+Math.cos(angle)*radius;const py=y+Math.sin(angle)*radius;ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.globalAlpha=0.9;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,1.2,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();}ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;}// 애니메이션 함수 - 실시간 업데이트용
export function updateEducationalBigBangCanvas(canvas,time){const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');// 배경
ctx.fillStyle='#000000';ctx.fillRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);// 단계별 위치
const stages=[{x:200,y:200,name:'쿼크-글루온\n플라즈마',time:'10⁻¹² 초'},{x:600,y:200,name:'양성자/중성자\n형성',time:'10⁻⁶ 초'},{x:200,y:550,name:'핵융합\n원자핵 형성',time:'1-3 분'},{x:600,y:550,name:'원자 형성\n(보어 모델)',time:'38만 년'}];// 각 단계 업데이트
updateStage0(ctx,stages[0].x,stages[0].y,time);updateStage1(ctx,stages[1].x,stages[1].y,time);updateStage2(ctx,stages[2].x,stages[2].y,time);updateStage3(ctx,stages[3].x,stages[3].y,time);// 텍스트 레이블
stages.forEach(stage=>{ctx.fillStyle='#ffffff';ctx.font='bold 14px Arial';ctx.textAlign='center';const lines=stage.name.split('\n');lines.forEach((line,i)=>{ctx.fillText(line,stage.x,stage.y+95+i*16);});ctx.fillStyle='#cccccc';ctx.font='12px Arial';ctx.fillText(stage.time,stage.x,stage.y+130);});}// 동적 업데이트 함수들
function updateStage0(ctx,x,y,time){drawColorfulCore(ctx,x,y,15,200);// 회전 궤도
drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,40,'#ff4444',time,0);drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,65,'#4488ff',time,1);drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,90,'#44ff44',time,2);}function updateStage1(ctx,x,y,time){drawColorfulCore(ctx,x,y,22,300);drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,45,'#ffaa88',time,0);drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,70,'#88bbff',time,1);}function updateStage2(ctx,x,y,time){drawNucleus(ctx,x,y,30,400);drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,45,'#ffcc77',time,0);}function updateStage3(ctx,x,y,time){// 핵
ctx.fillStyle='#ffff44';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,4,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();// 껍질
ctx.strokeStyle='#44bbff';ctx.lineWidth=1;for(let shell=0;shell<3;shell++){const radius=30+shell*25;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,radius,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();}// 회전하는 전자
drawRotatingElectrons(ctx,x,y,30,8,'#44bbff',time,0);drawRotatingElectrons(ctx,x,y,55,12,'#66ccff',time,1);drawRotatingElectrons(ctx,x,y,80,10,'#88ddff',time,2);}// 회전 궤도
function drawRotatingOrbit(ctx,x,y,radius,color,time,orbitIdx){ctx.strokeStyle=color;ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.globalAlpha=0.6;ctx.setLineDash([5,5]);ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,radius,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();ctx.setLineDash([]);ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;// 회전하는 입자들
const numParticles=Math.floor(radius*2.5);const rotationSpeed=(orbitIdx+1)*0.5;for(let i=0;i<numParticles;i++){const baseAngle=i/numParticles*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*rotationSpeed;const px=x+Math.cos(angle)*radius;const py=y+Math.sin(angle)*radius;ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.globalAlpha=0.8;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,0.8,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();}ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;}// 회전하는 전자
function drawRotatingElectrons(ctx,x,y,radius,count,color,time,shellIdx){const rotationSpeed=(shellIdx+1)*0.3;for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const baseAngle=i/count*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*rotationSpeed;const px=x+Math.cos(angle)*radius;const py=y+Math.sin(angle)*radius;ctx.fillStyle=color;ctx.globalAlpha=0.9;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(px,py,1.2,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();}ctx.globalAlpha=1.0;}// 단계 정보
export const educationalBigBangStages=[{id:0,name:"쿼크-글루온 플라즈마",timeRange:"10⁻¹² 초",description:"우주 극초기 - 극도로 뜨거운 상태"},{id:1,name:"양성자/중성자 형성",timeRange:"10⁻⁶ 초",description:"쿼크들이 결합하기 시작"},{id:2,name:"핵융합 → 원자핵",timeRange:"1-3 분",description:"헬륨-4, 리튬 등 형성"},{id:3,name:"원자 형성",timeRange:"38만 년",description:"전자가 원자핵 주변을 돌기 시작"}];
